title: Financial Aid Verification Forms
content:
Required Financial Aid Forms - Verification and Submission
Morgan State University

---

2024-2025 FORMS (Fall 2024, Spring 2025, Summer 2025)

- Verification V1, V4, and V5
- Documentation of Legal Dependent or Child You Support (LDEPEN)
- Documentation Independent Status (INDSTA)
- Documentation of Citizenship (CITIZN)
- Satisfactory Academic Progress (SAP) Appeal Form (APELF)
- Unusual Enrollment History (UEH) Appeal Request Form
- Dependency Override Request (DEPRE)
- Unaccompanied Homeless Youth (UHY) Form (HOME1, HOME2, HOME3)
- Special Circumstance Appeal
- Total and Permanent Disability Acknowledgement Form (TPD)
- Credit Evaluation Form (AUDIT)
- Title IV Authorization Form (Authorizations A & B)

---

2025-2026 FORMS (Fall 2025, Spring 2026, Summer 2026)

- Verification V1, V4, and V5
- Documentation of Legal Dependent or Child You Support (LDEPEN)
- Documentation Independent Status (INDSTA)
- Documentation of Citizenship (CITIZN)
- Satisfactory Academic Progress (SAP) Appeal Form (APELF)
- Unusual Enrollment History (UEH) Appeal Request Form
- Dependency Override Request (DEPRE)
- Unaccompanied Homeless Youth (UHY) Form (HOME1, HOME2, HOME3)
- Special Circumstance Appeal
- Total and Permanent Disability Acknowledgement Form (TPD)
- Credit Evaluation Form (AUDIT)
- Title IV Authorization Form (Authorizations A & B)
- Edward T. Conroy Application *DEADLINE JULY 15, 2025*

---

VERIFICATION PARTNERSHIP

Morgan State University has partnered with Inceptia to expedite the federal verification process. Verification Gateway (VG) from Inceptia is an online portal to guide students and parents through verification.

---

DOCUMENT SUBMISSION

All required documents can be:
- Faxed to: (443) 885-8272
- Emailed to: finaid@morgan.edu

IMPORTANT: Include your Student ID on all documents
Please allow 72 business hours for receipt to be posted on WEBSIS.
